states.emptyHint: When you add records, they will show up in this list.

errors.needTenant: Select a club in the header.
errors.noBranches: Add a sport branch in the database first.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Today’s pulse for your club.
dashboard.cardOpsBody: Schedules, attendance, and fixtures will surface here.
dashboard.cardPeopleBody: Athletes, guardians, and staff in one place — coming soon.

athletes.title: Athletes
athletes.subtitle: Roster and participation, built for clarity.
athletes.emptyHint: Add your first athlete to see them here.
athletes.teamsHint: Optional squad assignments. Training group stays on the profile.

groups.title: Groups
groups.subtitle: Training cohorts and age buckets — separate from teams.
groups.memberHint: Athletes set a primary group on their profile; teams are optional.

teams.title: Teams
teams.subtitle: Squads and competitive units linked to branches.

training.title: Training sessions
training.subtitle: Planned practices for groups and optional teams.
training.emptyHint: Create a session to start recording attendance.
training.attendanceHint: Mark who was there. Bulk entry is ready for later automation.

finance.title: Finance
finance.subtitle: Charges and payments when you are ready.
finance.hubBody: Define reusable fee types, then assign charges to athletes.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Definitions, saved filters, and exports — foundation in place.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Club profile and preferences.
settings.placeholder: Tenant profile, notifications, and locale defaults will land here after authentication.

landing.headline: Run your club with calm confidence.
landing.sub: One place for groups, teams, schedules, and money — without the clutter.
